/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librtdl_demo_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o librtdl_demo_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/rtdl_demo_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rtdl_demo_interfaces/msg/detail/object_state__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rtdl_demo_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rtdl_demo_interfaces/msg/detail/world_state__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rtdl_demo_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rtdl_demo_interfaces/srv/detail/check_object_in_room__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rtdl_demo_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rtdl_demo_interfaces/srv/detail/get_world_state__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rtdl_demo_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rtdl_demo_interfaces/srv/detail/nav_to__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rtdl_demo_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rtdl_demo_interfaces/srv/detail/pick__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rtdl_demo_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rtdl_demo_interfaces/srv/detail/place__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rtdl_demo_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rtdl_demo_interfaces/srv/detail/pick_pri__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rtdl_demo_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rtdl_demo_interfaces/srv/detail/place_pri__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
